_comment: Committed fixture so bench/det_vs_llm.py can BOOTSTRAP its own sample (the real output/ dir is gitignored + transient). Reconstructs a representative ~1-page Nuro_SWE selection: both experiences (all bullets, master order) + four projects, bullets verbatim by id. The headline token numbers are robust to the exact selection.
skills: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, SQL, HTML/CSS
Git, Linux, Docker, AWS, Azure, Google Colab
